assertions.title: Timeline slider renders on org chart view

steps.action: Open Org Chart view in isolated scenario
steps.expected: Timeline slider panel is visible with start/end labels and default current state
steps.observed: Timeline panel rendered with 'Showing: Current', start/end labels (Apr 16, 2026 to Apr 19, 2026), and range slider

assertions.title: Dragging slider to past date shows historical org snapshot

steps.action: Scrub timeline to first create marker (historical)
steps.observed: Only Alice is shown; later hires (Carol/Bob) are not visible

steps.expected: Removed employee reappears in historical view
steps.observed: Bob reappears in chart at historical point

assertions.title: Timeline tracks headcount, departures, and reorgs

steps.expected: Headcount indicator updates and reorg is reflected
steps.observed: Reorg state is reflected (Bob under Carol), but Total headcount pill remains 2 while 3 employees are visible
Current chart and summary both show 2

assertions.issues: Headcount summary pill does not update while scrubbing historical timeline states.

steps.action: Switch granularity from Day to Week to Month
steps.expected: Tick marks/snap granularity adjust per mode
steps.observed: Granularity toggles work and timeline tick spacing changes across Day/Week/Month modes

evidence.network: UI-only toggle behavior; no failing network requests observed

assertions.title: Scheduled changes reflect on timeline slider

steps.action: Create future scheduled title change for Alice (effective 2026-04-18)
steps.expected: Pending marker/indicator visible while current title remains unchanged
steps.observed: Pending indicator shown; current title remains 'Director Engineering'

steps.action: Scrub timeline forward past effective date
steps.observed: Title updates to 'VP Engineering' in scrubbed future view

assertions.title: Filter state preserved when switching views

steps.action: Apply filters (Active-only) and search query 'Alice' on Org Chart
steps.expected: Toolbar filter/search state applies to current view
steps.observed: Only Alice is shown under current filters/search

steps.action: Navigate Org Chart -> Hierarchy -> Spreadsheet -> Kanban -> Compare -> Org Chart
steps.expected: Status toggles and search text persist across all view switches; results remain consistent
steps.observed: Search/filter state persisted across all navigations and result set remained consistent

evidence.network: View-route navigation only; no request failures observed

frictions.description: Timeline event markers overlap visually, causing pointer-click interception between adjacent markers.
frictions.resolution: Used keyboard slider controls and marker click handlers via in-session script to scrub exact event points.

frictions.description: Timeline panel did not refresh immediately after creating timeline events in-session.
frictions.resolution: Reloaded the page once to force timeline refetch for the active scenario.

frictions.description: Scheduling flow entry from card interactions was unreliable due inline-edit interception.
frictions.resolution: Bootstrapped one scheduled change via authenticated in-session API (allowed by flow guidance) and validated behavior through UI timeline scrubbing.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 1 failed (VAL-AV-003: headcount indicator does not update to historical snapshot while scrubbing timeline).
